---
name: Rule request
about: Suggest a new readiness rule or ecosystem check
title: "rule: "
labels: good first issue, rules
assignees: ""
---

## Ecosystem or signal

Example: Python, Rust, Go, README quality, dangerous scripts, CI.

## What should RepoReady detect?

Describe the files, scripts, commands, or patterns.

## Why does this matter for AI coding agents?

Explain how this helps Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, or contributors.

## Suggested fixtures

List example files or repository structures that should pass/fail.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The rule appears in evidence or score breakdown
- [ ] Tests cover the new rule
- [ ] English output is clear
- [ ] Chinese output is clear when user-facing
